query:
SELECT 
  contract_no,
  status,
  debt_type,
  JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.debt_type') as raw_debt_type,
  JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.contract_status_code') as raw_status
FROM contracts
WHERE section = 'Boonphone'
LIMIT 5;
